summary: The answer directly addresses the question and correctly separates passive PL/RMCD probe roles from active optical pumping/control of integer and fractional Chern states. It includes the required concepts and appropriate uncertainty about missing quantitative details. Main weakness: it cites and relies on at least two claims not present in the supplied context excerpt, especially local compressibility/magneto-optics and optical switching/domain-wall writing, so faithfulness and citation quality are reduced.
